rationale: Educ. Code §11.067 governs vendor contracting prohibitions for school districts. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts and contains no provision affected by the proposed change.
quote: Sec. 11.067. PROHIBITION ON CERTAIN ACTIVITY BY VENDOR.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns vendor/board-of-trustees ethics, not property tax exemptions.
